title: Google Docs junk drawer
html:
Stub. The Google-Docs analogue of the Apple Notes junk-drawer form (see source-kind doc at wiki/sources/apple-notes-junk-drawer.md): the family of zero-content artifacts that show up in Yahir's gdocs export — empty-body docs (title-only opened-but-never-filled), saved-template-blank-form artifacts (forms downloaded for reference and never completed), and link-dump-only docs (just a list of bookmarks pasted into a doc).

First surfaced in slice wave6-gd3 across:

  • 2023 04 03 thoughts on 4223 (empty-body subtype)
  • 2024 02 16 cs 494 final project team evaluation (saved-blank-form subtype)
  • 2020 09 25 potential online school outcome (3-line micro-fragment subtype)
  • 2020 04 06 business relief loans (link-dump subtype)

Useful as a taxonomy bucket for the gdocs-corpus archaeology Yahir is running across the Google Takeout import.

related.label: Business relief loans (April 2020 CARES Act / SBA loan research for Gtano's)
CS 494 final project team evaluation (Feb 2024 OSU course form)
